summary.lv: Intrum Global Technologies meklē Senior QA Automation Engineer datu platformas komandai — lai definētu QA stratēģiju, testētu Databricks pipeline'us un datu transformācijas, kā arī izstrādātu automatizētos testus.
summary.en: Intrum Global Technologies is looking for a Senior QA Automation Engineer for its data platform team to define QA strategy, test Databricks pipelines and data transformations, and build automated test frameworks.
